name: Toggl Track
description: Manage Toggl Track (time entries, projects, clients, tags, workspaces) from any AI agent. 9 tools, basic-auth with API token.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Toggl Track API v9 (api.track.toggl.com/api/v9).

**Setup**:
1. Log into https://track.toggl.com → bottom-left avatar → **Profile settings** → scroll to **API Token** → reveal/copy.
2. Set `TOGGL_API_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: HTTP Basic, with API token as the username and the literal string `api_token` as the password:
  `Authorization: Basic base64(TOKEN:api_token)`
The adapter sets this automatically via BASIC_AUTH (username=token, password=api_token). DO NOT pass real user/password — Toggl only accepts the token-pair.

**Workspace IDs**: Toggl Track is workspace-scoped. Most endpoints need a `workspace_id`. Use `toggl_track_me` first — its response contains `default_workspace_id` and `workspaces[].id`.

**Running timer**: Toggl allows exactly ONE running entry per user at a time. Starting a new one stops any prior. To start, POST a time entry with `duration: -1` and `start: <ISO now>`. To stop, PATCH the entry to set `stop: <ISO>` and `duration: <seconds>`.

**Dates**: ISO 8601 with timezone (`2026-05-20T14:30:00+00:00`). Toggl is strict about timezone — naive datetimes get rejected.

**Rate limits**: 1 req/s per IP soft, burst tolerated. 429 with `Retry-After` for hard throttling.

**Out of scope here**: Toggl Reports v3 (different host, paid plans get more — could be a sibling adapter), team management, billing.

tools.name: toggl_track_me
tools.description: Get the authenticated user including default workspace ID, all workspaces, default project/tag. Use this first to find the workspace ID needed by other tools.

with_related_data.description: If true, include projects/clients/tags inline (heavier response).

tools.name: toggl_track_list_workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces the user belongs to.

tools.name: toggl_track_list_projects
tools.description: List projects in a workspace. Returns id, name, client_id, color, billable, active, estimated_hours, hourly_rate.

tools.name: toggl_track_get_current_entry
tools.description: Return the currently running time entry (if any), else null.

tools.name: toggl_track_list_time_entries
tools.description: List time entries for the current user. Filter by start/end date window. Returns each entry with id, description, project_id, billable, duration (seconds, negative for running), start/stop.

before.description: ISO 8601: only entries with stop_time before this.

since.description: UNIX timestamp; only entries modified after.

tools.name: toggl_track_create_time_entry
tools.description: Create a new time entry. Pass `duration: -1` + `start` (ISO 8601) to start a running timer; pass positive duration (seconds) + start to log a completed entry.

duration.description: Seconds. -1 to start a running timer.

tools.name: toggl_track_stop_time_entry
tools.description: Stop a running time entry. Sets stop=now and converts duration to positive seconds.
